para.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;

body.para: If any peripheral devices are also provided as separate units at factory shipping, assemble these devices.

para.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;

body.para: Connect the piping by aligning the alignment marks on the piping.

list.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:26px; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:20px; font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:20px; font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

image.src: Fig 2.5 Spindle & Screw Oil Temperature Controller Piping_edit.png

para.style: text-align:center; margin-left:26px;

para.text: Figure <%HMFIGURECOUNTER3=1%>.<%HMFIGURECOUNTER%> Spindle Oil Temperature Controller Piping

body.para: Insert the trough [2] into the trough connection port [1] of the coolant tank, and connect the coolant tank.

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:10px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

list.li: Piping from main pump: 2-inch union connection
Spiral cleaning coolant hose: 3/4-inch hose connection

para.style: text-align:center; margin-bottom:6px;
text-align:center; margin-bottom:10px;

image.src: Fig 2.7 Coolant Piping Locations (Coolant Tank Side)_edit.png

margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:10px;

body.para: Connect the air piping from the plant air source to the air supply port (Rc3/8) [1].

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:10px; margin-left:26px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:-1px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:1px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
margin-bottom:6px; page-break-before:always;

body.para: If this machine will be shipped outside Singapore, be sure to drain all the hydraulic oil and cooling oil before shipment. Supply oil up to the upper limit level on the level gauge [2] before turning ON the power.

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:8px; margin-bottom:8px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;
